description: Demo register: three ordinary scripts in three languages + one gated tool. No SDK, no framework, no build step - each tool is one JSON entry.

tools.name: Summarize
tools.summary: First-sentence summary + word count of a block of text (Python).
tools.instructions: Args: { text: string }. Returns { summary, words }.

tools.name: Sentiment
tools.summary: Crude positive/negative word tally for a block of text (Bash).
tools.instructions: Args: { text: string }. Returns { positive, negative, verdict }.

tools.name: Slugify
tools.summary: Turn any text into a URL-safe slug (Node).
tools.instructions: Args: { text: string }. Returns the kebab-case slug string.

tools.name: Cleanup
tools.summary: Delete build artifacts (DESTRUCTIVE - gated by a PreToolUse policy hook).
tools.instructions: Args: { path: string }. Deletes build artifacts under the given path. This tool exists to demonstrate the gate: the shipped hooks.manifest.json DENIES it, and the deny happens server-side - no client cooperation required.
